item.title: Absolutely Fascinating
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: Was chillin' with the wife the other daaay
item.description:
Reached out to check-in, we met for a playdate once
They went to stay with a neighbor one bad night, neighbor thought they were helping...
You wonder why more women dont go to shelters? this is why...
the lesser of two evils is.... the devil.
we offered them our basement apartment.
"property" by another name...
Resistance is futile, you will be assimilated... into this family.
Car is now securable and weather-proof.
USDA grade A pig anus
"...you found a family of angels." Meh, of the Morningstar variety perhaps. But whateves...
why a spoon, cousin?
Blocked, deleted.
She's been ready for this, just needed help with that first step.
No expectatons asked. Just heal, and be respectful.
(prior to the blocking). It warmed the cocklers of my black heart watching him unhinge.
A sacrifice was made, but I can afford it. We can afford this easily
[insert philosoraptor] If one has the means to intervene and does nothing are they complicite in the act? Abetting through Aquiescence. "The student once asked the wise master "Why did god create atheists?". To whch the master replied "To show christians what true compassion looks like. The atheist is kind for kindness's sake, for they have no heavenly reward to look forward to" Be excellent to each other.
item.dc:creator: SkronkieGrossburgers

item.title: Saw this, fact checked and it's still happening, so thought I should share to let people know!
item.description: Full disclosure, I cropped the top pic so the kids face wasn't in it... It's an old image, and even if it wasn't, no kid should be blamed for the decisions of the parents... But I thought people might want to know what this group is before handing money over
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: My Tenth Dump
item.description:
And we're back to our regularly scheduled programming! Our dump today starts on December 12th, 2021.
Let us see what wonders the timeline of random memes I downloaded to share with friends brings us today.
I mean, it started out strong with a sexy Shrek meme, which really is how all dumps should start.
Not really a meme, I guess, but I must have thought it was interesting. I still do, in fact!
I believe this is related to that one time where Amazon told workers in one of their warehouses that they couldn't leave even during severe tornado warnings. And good thing too, if you ask me, otherwise a few people might not have gotten their pointless crap on the same day they ordered it.
Again, not really a meme, but I think you can all appreciate that there is an axolotl on this 50 pesos bill. And if you can't, we might have to reconsider our friendship.
This meme is back from where it was more strange and bewildering, whereas nowadays Miss Rowling is uuuuhhhh... shamelessly despicable?
Let this serve as a reminder that there is no bigger bitch in the galaxy than Erebus.
Another point in the timeline that lets us know when we're at. In this case, Winnie the Pooh entering public domain, just like Steamboat Willie did recently.
So chuffed.
So No Way Home must've come out around this time too...
Frog memes, frog memes, different kinds of frog memes!
Hey, remember NFT's?
I... I... I played Alliance.
Today we end the dump not with ONE unrelated bait image, but with TWO, because HNNNNHHHGHH...
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
relationship goals
if you don’t return your cart, you suck
mmm hmm
Vin Diesel stunt double auditions?
never realized how metal cooking is
as is tradition
wait what
what an odd picture
I guess
I’ve eaten crocodile before, in Africa. not for me
life can be so hard
so sassy
oddly specific but also relatable
we’ve all done this
I do it for you guys. and me, making dumps is fun
for instance, many of the images in this dump
that's my set.. have a great night gang!! happy st pattys

item.title: Images of Note: H O R S E P L I N K O
item.description:
Enough! Get in the Piss River
GO BACK TO THE SEX CAVE!
The fact party Cannon has that logo is amazing
In the Pale Moonlight is the Best fucking Episode of Star Trek
ALL HAIL THE COFFEE WITCH!
8|
The fact the Japanese is "Rosu" and the Chinese is "Lào" is sending me.
Imagine. Just fucking imagine. Also what is it with American Conservatives making their own kick off TV shows like a fucking cult...wait.
c u b e
the "no in real life" is sending me.
Sometimes you get some wild bullshit in old newspapers.
AAAAAAAAAA
uwu
:3
I will say this, Emily gives off Serial Killer vibes. Her sister (Haley) is all "no thoughts, head empty" but Emily is all "YES THOUGHTS, HEAD FULL OF ELABORATE MURDER SCHEMES".
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay I'm Also streaming (last day BEFORE 1.6) http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Oh, hell no. Clarence! Check this shit out!
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Warning to my Imgur folks. Dude steals
item.description:
I first saw this dude here on Imgur. As a fellow person of the arts I wanted to show support and purchased a piece of his work.
He found his target audience … other artists that want to support each other. I watched him here on Imgur and saw his progress. I decided to purchase a piece.
In October of last year (2023) I went for it.
I had also seen him on instagram which is when I made the decision to go ahead and buy. I paid $280.80 dollars for a piece titled “purple pain.” I received a confirmation #. I received an email to comfirm it and a response from the getahun gallery. That’s it . Never hear anything again. Nothing. Nada. Ghosted. I emailed several times. Several times. Every month. I went to the site and sent messages. I commented on his instagram posts . I reported the account on insta. I tried to find the account on Imgur but I can’t locate it. I made comments on his insta post. Over and over and over. I was messaged by others that they were scammed. DO NOT PURCHASE ANYTHING. His rent has been paid. His small business is a scam. I reported this to my bank and I hope to receive my money back. Please spread the word because actual artists suffer as this creates mistrust me devalues all of the hard work us actual people put into creating real and genuine business for others to have art they love in their life. Screw him and this shitty disservice this creates for the art community. Shame on this guy. Shame on getahun gallery. Shame on wasting art material. Screw your art. Shame to ghost people. Shame to continue to ask people to help PAY RENT. The insta is: art_by_getahun. Getahun Gallery. Imgur community deserves better.
item.dc:creator: Ijustwanttobememe

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Some Mjondays you can just tell...it's going to be a rough week. So fight back, and win, with the 233sh eromeme album!
item.description:
Good morning. I have been gone a while. I had company over for 2 posting days and then I have had a bit of a down period. I am ok. I just needed time and space so I took it. I am going to try and be back to Monday postings and hopefully Thursdays as well, as long as I have enough material lol.
Qnuack
Take the time you need. Life isn't going to stop, your job won't stop. So just take the time you need to heal and recover and to rest. The world will be there for you when you're back. May your way be green and golden, and the sun be at your back. Here's the archive. It's out of date. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Take the victories where I can get em <3
item.description: Short story time. I got my license to be an EMT through the military four years ago, but I haven't been confident enough in my skills to start work until recently, but I've been studying the whole time. That's probably because I grew up being told how worthless and lazy I am. I managed to move out of my parents for a while but it was abrupt because my dad put a gun to my head over some dirty dishes (really wish I was exaggerating) and I just wasn't financially ready so I ended up having to move back in but now with debt.... The problem is he's back up to his old ways and is drinking again... My debt isn't terrible I just need to save up my next four paychecks and I'll be square. Anyways, I just needed to vent. I'm fairly certain that this post is going to get down voted into oblivion. BUT I'M AN EMT NOW AND I'M ACTUALLY DOING GOOD FUCK YEAH.
item.dc:creator: MedicinalBooty

item.description: https://www.gentlebarn.org/donate • Donate to the Gentle Barn, which rescues and cares for pigs like these, and a bunch of other animals too! A few comments are asking about plant-based diets. Here's a good place to start: https://veganuary.com/

item.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Kurt Russell, with his 78 year old girlfriend Goldie Hawn
item.description:
Born: March 17, 1951 Birthplace: Springfield, Massachusetts, USA Age: 73 years old JAMIE MCCARTHY/GETTY IMAGES
May 4, 2017 Goldie Hawn and Kurt Russell are honored with stars on the Hollywood Walk of Fame photo: Stewart Cook/Variety/REX/Shutterstock.
October - 2022 Goldie Hawn and Kurt Russell dress up for granddaughter Rani Rose's birthday photo: GOLDIE HAWN INSTAGRAM
Gilligan Meets Kurt Russell (Jungle Boy) (1965)
Captain Ron - 1992 - Kurt Russell, Martin Short
Bob Denver and a young Kurt Russell on Gilligan's Island (1964)
Russell at the 2016 San Diego Comic-Con
